meaning: 蒙哥马利郡[英国威尔士原郡名]
examples: But Glyn Davies, Conservative MP for Montgomeryshire, said it was important to preserve freedom of speech.
The species was once widespread in Wales and found in Meirionnydd, Montgomeryshire, Carmarthenshire, Breconshire and Ceredigion.
Mick Bates (Montgomeryshire, Lib Dem) wanted reassurance that free school travel be taken away.
